channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: New Vatican document offers AI guidelines from warfare to health care
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — A Vatican document released Tuesday offers wide-ranging ethical guidelines for the application of artificial intelligence in sectors from warfare to health care, with an underlying call that the burgeoning technology must be used as a tool to complement, and not replace, human in
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Financial management QSMO growing in use, providers
item.description: Steve Nulter, a senior business analyst in the Quality Service Management Office, said more agencies are using financial management shared services. The post Financial management QSMO growing in use, providers first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: The WWE 2K25 release date is here, with Roman Reigns revealed as cover star
item.description: WWE 2K25 has officially been announced with world-renowned wrestler Roman Reigns revealed as the cover star.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: DeepSeek just blew up the AI industry’s narrative that it needs more money and power
item.description: The Chinese company’s large language model is basically a cheaper, more efficient ChatGPT, built on a fraction of OpenAI’s budget and using far fewer chips than any other leading chatbot.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: OpenAI Launches ChatGPT Gov for Government Agencies
item.description: OpenAI launches a new version of its popular ChatGPT model tailored to government agencies and workers.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Endor Labs’ new tool helps enterprises track the AI models they use
item.description: Software supply chain security vendor Endor Labs has added another dimension to its products with Tuesday’s launch of AI Model Discovery, which will be part of its core open-source evaluation offering.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Philips' new OLED TVs offer next-gen panels with your choice of extra image quality or better built-in sound, and I like this direction
item.description: LG's new Primary RGB Tandem panels, combined with hardcore image processing and Bowers & Wilkins sound options.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Scalpers are salivating right now - MSI suggests RTX 5090 supply will be tight due to Nvidia's shortage
item.description: It isn't much of a surprise, but the RTX 5090 is expected to have a short supply according to Nvidia's partner, MSI.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: A distributed state of mind: Event-driven multi-agent systems
item.description: While large language models are useful for chatbots, Q&A systems, translation, and other language tasks, their real power emerges when they can act on insights, automating a broader range of problems. In other words, we unlock their greatest potential when we tap their reasoning capabilities.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: How China's DeepSeek shook up US markets, by the numbers
item.description: News from China upset U.S. markets Monday and disrupted the frenzy that had built up around artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Perplexity AI’s new bid for TikTok could give U.S. 50% stake
item.description: Perplexity AI has presented a new proposal to TikTok’s parent company that would allow the U.S. government to own up to 50% of a new entity that merges Perplexity with TikTok’s U.S. business, according to a person familiar with the matter.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Google Launches Chrome Web Store for Enterprises
item.description: Google launches Chrome Web Store for Enterprises, a new store designed for business users.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Chris Hayes: Musk changes to X 'massively destructive' to how people see the news
item.description: MSNBC host Chris Hays tore into billionaire Elon Musk and warned against what he characterized as the "massively destructive" effect he is having on the information business. "Oh, it’s just massively destructive.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: Sweden seizes vessel suspected of 'sabotage' after undersea data cable rupture in Baltic Sea
item.description: RIGA, Latvia (AP) — Swedish prosecutors announced Sunday night that they have opened a preliminary investigation into suspected aggravated “sabotage” and ordered the detention of a vessel in the Baltic Sea suspected of damaging an underwater fiber optic cable connecting Latvia and the Swedish island
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Don’t let this credit card fraud nightmare happen to you
item.description: Over 400,000 cases of credit card fraud were reported in 2024 to the Federal Trade Commission. The CyberGuy explains how to protect against becoming another victim.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Families sue TikTok in France over teen suicides they say are linked to harmful content
item.description: CASSIS, France (AP) — In the moment when her world shattered three years ago, Stephanie Mistre found her 15-year-old daughter, Marie, lifeless in the bedroom where she died by suicide.
item.dc:creator: TOM NOUVIAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Spain's leader wants the EU to ‘make social media great again.’ Here's how
item.description: DAVOS, Switzerland (AP) — Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez is launching a crusade against what he sees as the downsides of social media.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON and JAMEY KEATEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: How to cope when disasters strip away photos, heirlooms and other pieces of the past
item.description: They’re the possessions that tell your story: the photos of old friends and relatives. The ring your mom left you. The hand-knit Christmas stockings. Your grandfather's secretary desk and the letters inside.
item.dc:creator: JULIA RUBIN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: AI at Work: How SOS 102 is Building Safer Communities in Kazakhstan
item.description: Emergency response systems worldwide are undergoing rapid transformation, and Kazakhstan is no exception. With the introduction of the SOS 102 app, the country has set a new standard for public safety, redefining how law enforcement interacts with citizens.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Musk clashes with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over Trump-supported Stargate AI data center project
item.description: Elon Musk is clashing with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman over the Stargate artificial intelligence infrastructure project touted by President Donald Trump, the latest in a feud between the two tech billionaires that started on OpenAI's board and is now testing Musk's influence with the new president.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4
